title: 200 Wood Folding Chairs with 8 Dollies and 8 Straps Bundle
features: Upgrade your event setup with our bundle of 200 Wood Folding Chairs, complete with 8 Dollies and 8 Straps for easy transport.
Perfect for weddings, parties, and gatherings, these elegant chairs offer both style and convenience.
Our dollar saving bundle deal includes 200 Wood Folding Chairs with 8 dollies and 8 straps to securely transport your chairs to and from any event venue.
Also included in this bundle is an option to purchase stack covers for added protection and worry free storage.
Please note: the Mahogany Wood Folding Chairs feature a black pad.

If you're an event venue or party rental company owner and you have 50 square feet free in your warehouse or storage facility, we suggest investing in our 200 Wood Folding Chair and 8 Folding Chair Dolly bundle.
If you still have 50 square after that then by all means, buy that hot tub you've been craving and get ready for an eternal summer.

faq.question: Can I add more chairs to the bundle and get a discount on those chairs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add more chairs and qualify for the bundle discount. We recommend reaching out and asking for a quote!
